templates.label: rate + driver
templates.text: We don't yet understand how fast/where/when [phenomenon] is changing or what is driving that change.

templates.label: trigger + conditions
templates.text: We don't yet understand what triggers [phenomenon] and under what conditions it accelerates or slows.

templates.label: A vs B interpretation
templates.text: It's unclear whether [observed signal] reflects [meaning/cause A] or [meaning/cause B].

patterns.label: Empty draft
patterns.description: The Business Problem field is blank. Mark needs an uncertainty to coach against.
good_examples: It's unclear whether the recent dip in repeat purchases reflects price sensitivity or product-fit issues.
We don't yet understand what is driving the rise in support tickets from new sign-ups.
avoid_examples: We need to launch feature X.
patterns.advice: Describe an uncertainty you don't yet understand -- not a plan, tactic, or solution.

patterns.label: Too short
patterns.description: The draft is too brief to convey what is changing and what is unknown.
good_examples: We're seeing high trial rates but low repeat usage, but don't know what users find missing or disappointing.
We don't yet understand how fast trial drop-off is changing or what is driving that change.
patterns.advice: Add what is changing or observed and what is unknown about why or under what conditions.

patterns.label: Solution bias
patterns.description: The draft proposes a feature, tactic, or campaign instead of stating an uncertainty.
good_examples: It's unclear whether checkout abandonment reflects pricing perception or trust concerns about the new payment provider.
We don't yet understand what is driving the gap between sign-up and first-action for the new persona.
avoid_examples: Build a referral program to grow signups.
Add a discount banner on the pricing page.
patterns.advice: Replace the solution / feature / tactic language with the underlying uncertainty it is meant to resolve.

patterns.label: Missing uncertainty
patterns.description: The draft describes a situation but does not name what is unknown or uncertain.
good_examples: It's unclear whether daily active usage is dropping because of notification fatigue or because the core workflow no longer fits the new persona.
We don't yet understand under what conditions teams convert from free to paid after a workspace invite.
patterns.advice: Use uncertainty markers (don't know, unclear, uncertain, not yet understood) and name a driver, trigger or condition.

templates.label: invest vs pause
templates.text: Whether to invest in deeper exploration of this opportunity or pause until the key assumptions are clearer.

templates.label: continue vs redirect
templates.text: Whether our current direction is promising enough to pursue, or whether we should redirect to alternatives.

templates.label: narrow directions
templates.text: How to narrow the plausible directions before committing resources to one.

patterns.label: Empty draft
patterns.description: The Decision-to-support field is blank. Mark needs a discovery-stage choice to coach against.
good_examples: Whether to invest in deeper exploration of this opportunity or pause further work until assumptions are clearer.
How to narrow the set of plausible directions before committing resources to one.
avoid_examples: Decide whether to launch the new pricing tier.
Pick which features to ship next quarter.
patterns.advice: Describe a discovery-stage choice blocked by uncertainty -- not an execution decision.

patterns.label: Too short
patterns.description: The draft is too brief to convey what is being chosen and why it depends on what we learn.
good_examples: Whether our current direction is promising enough to pursue, or if we should redirect attention to alternative approaches.
Whether to invest in a deeper second study or pause until we have stronger qualitative signal.
patterns.advice: Frame the choice in invest-vs-pause, continue-vs-redirect, or narrow-directions terms.

patterns.label: Solution bias
patterns.description: The draft is a build/launch/pricing decision rather than a discovery decision.
good_examples: Whether to continue investing in the current onboarding hypothesis or redirect to a workspace-first hypothesis.
How to narrow between three persona segments before committing roadmap effort.
avoid_examples: Whether to launch the new pricing tier in Q3.
Choose which campaign creative to run.
patterns.advice: Replace the feature / pricing / launch decision with the discovery-stage decision it should inform.

patterns.label: Missing uncertainty
patterns.description: The draft describes a choice but does not link it to what is still unknown.
good_examples: Whether to invest in a deeper exploratory study or pause until we know whether the drop-off is driver A or driver B.
How to narrow our three candidate hypotheses before committing further engineering resources.
patterns.advice: Make the choice contingent on what is still unknown (e.g. invest vs pause until we know more).
